name: cloudflare-blade-mcp
title: Cloudflare Platform
description: Cloudflare platform operations — DNS zones and records, Workers KV storage, D1 databases, and Cloudflare Tunnels with token-efficient defaults and confirm gates
author: groupthink-dev

env.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
env.description: Cloudflare API token with Zone DNS Edit, Account Workers KV Edit, Account D1 Edit, and Account Tunnel Edit permissions

env.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
env.description: Cloudflare Account ID — required for KV, D1, and Tunnel tools. Found in dashboard overview page

env.name: MCP_API_TOKEN
env.description: Bearer token for HTTP transport authentication (optional, only needed for HTTP mode)

setup.blurb: Manage DNS records, Workers KV, D1 databases, and Cloudflare Tunnels. Token-efficient concise output saves 60-80% on API response tokens.
setup.help_text: Create a custom API token at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens. Grant Zone > DNS > Edit for DNS tools, and Account-level Workers KV Storage, D1, and Cloudflare Tunnel Edit permissions for the remaining tools. Tokens can be scoped to specific zones if you only need DNS.

fields.label: API Token
fields.help: Custom token with Zone DNS Edit and Account-level KV/D1/Tunnel Edit permissions

fields.label: Account ID
fields.help: Found on any zone's overview page in the Cloudflare dashboard, or via the API
